command: set -eu; WT="$1"; cd "$WT"; UUID=$(python3 -c 'import uuid; print(uuid.uuid4())'); mkdir -p .review-loop/sessions; cp tests/skills/fixtures/sessions/v2.6.0-approved-session.md ".review-loop/sessions/${UUID}.md"; cleanup() { rm -f ".review-loop/sessions/${UUID}.lock"; }; trap cleanup EXIT; exec claude -p --no-session-persistence --permission-mode bypassPermissions --add-dir "$WT" -- "Use the review-loop:execute skill with --session ${UUID} --stop-after before-docs --accept-external-state. The preseeded session is a valid v2.6.0 session whose Approved Plan is already satisfied by the current working tree, so the execution round should APPROVE as a no-op, Step 3.5 Quality Polish should pass, and the orchestrator must stop cleanly before Step 3.6 — completed_stages must be the YAML list [exec, polish] and the session must not contain a ## Delivery section. Do NOT deliver."
